---
title: Local development
---

## Setup

This project uses `uv` for dependency management.

- Install dependencies: `just install`

## Common commands

- Run a full workflow (cached): `just workflow`
- Run a fresh workflow (bypass cache): `just workflow-fresh`
- Generate the report (all formats): `just report-all`
- Build the HTML report site: `just site`

## Testing and quality

- Format + lint: `just check`
- Run tests: `uv run pytest`
